description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a gray gable roof and light-colored exterior walls. The front features a covered porch with columns, a manicured lawn, and a driveway leading to an attached garage. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture, a swimming pool, and several trees and shrubs, creating a welcoming outdoor living space. Windows are symmetrically arranged, with multiple panes and decorative trim, enhancing the home's classic appearance. The house is surrounded by a well-maintained yard, bordered by pathways and garden beds. Architectural details such as dormer windows and a prominent entryway give the house a traditional, inviting look.
description: A spacious, two-story suburban house with a gray gable roof, symmetrical windows, a covered front porch, and a landscaped yard with a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entryway, attached garage, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side and rear view highlighting the backyard patio, swimming pool, and side elevation of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio area, and symmetrical arrangement of rear windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional landscaping, and the rear portion of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, central door, steps, and decorative trim
